div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 48px; font-weight: 700; color: rgb(81, 93, 109); text-align: center; text-decoration: none;
div.span: Get Post的区别

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: center; text-decoration: none;
div.span: WHAT

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: 是什么，目的是什么，做什么工作。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: 语义

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: GET 的语义是从服务器获取指定的资源

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: POST 的语义是根据请求负荷（报文body）对指定的资源做出处理

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: 参数位置

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: GET 请求的参数位置一般是写在 URL 中

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: POST 请求携带数据的位置一般是写在报文 body 中

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: 参数长度和编码

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: GET 请求的参数位置一般是写在 URL 中，URL 规定只能支持 ASCII，所以 GET 请求的参数只允许 ASCII 字符 ，而且浏览器会对 URL 的长度有限制

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: POST 请求携带数据的位置一般是写在报文 body 中，body 中的数据可以是任意格式的数据，只要客户端与服务端协商好即可，而且浏览器不会对 body 大小做限制

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: 幂等性

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: 从 RFC 规范定义的语义来看

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: GET 方法就是安全且幂等的，因为它是「只读」操作，无论操作多少次，服务器上的数据都是安全的，且每次的结果都是相同的。所以，可以对 GET 请求的数据做缓存，这个缓存可以做到浏览器本身上（彻底避免浏览器发请求），也可以做到代理上（如nginx），而且在浏览器中 GET 请求可以保存为书签。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: POST 因为是「新增或提交数据」的操作，会修改服务器上的资源，所以是不安全的，且多次提交数据就会创建多个资源，所以不是幂等的。所以，浏览器一般不会缓存 POST 请求，也不能把 POST 请求保存为书签。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: 安全性

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: 无论是GET还是POST请求，都使用的是同一个传输层协议，安全性是相同的；如果是HTTP协议，就是不安全的，因为报文都是明文传输；如果是HTTPS协议就是安全的，因为报文都是密文传输且很难破解

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: center; text-decoration: none;
div.span: HOW

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: 怎么做，如何提高效率，如何实施，方法是什么。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: center; text-decoration: none;
div.span: WHY

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: 为什么要做，可不可以不做，有没有替代方案。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: center; text-decoration: none;
div.span: WHO

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: 谁，由谁来做。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: center; text-decoration: none;
div.span: WHEN

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: 何时，什么时间做，什么时机最适宜。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: center; text-decoration: none;
div.span: WHERE

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: 何处，在哪里做。

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: center; text-decoration: none;
div.span: HOW MUCH

div.style: user-select: none; --webkit-user-select:none; line-height: normal; overflow: visible; white-space: break-spaces; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-overflow: clip; font-family: NeverMind, sans-serif, "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft JhengHei", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgb(67, 75, 84); text-align: left; text-decoration: none;
div.span: 多少，做到什么程度，数量如何，质量水平如何，费用产出如何。
